title: spa mod
description: adds spa features and relaxion bar
body:
Wellness Spa Mod

Wellness Spa Mod turns Minecraft into a luxury spa and wellness experience.

Create elegant spa spaces with marble tiles, sauna walls, hot stones, jacuzzi blocks, steam machines, massage beds, aroma candles, towel racks, reception desks, and decorative panels. Use themed items like bathrobes, towels, spa tea, aroma oil, massage oil, baby oil, and hot stone sets to complete the atmosphere.

Features

Luxury spa themed blocks and decorations
Sauna, steam room, jacuzzi, massage and relaxation mechanics
Relaxation Bar shown on the HUD
Standing in spa areas increases relaxation
Jacuzzi water gives regeneration
Sauna and steam areas provide relaxation effects
Steam machines release visible steam particles
Players can massage other players and villagers
Each right click massage increases the target's relaxation by 1
Villagers show their relaxation level above their heads when you get close
Wearable bathrobe
Turkish and English language support
Custom creative tab for all spa items and blocks
Perfect for

Roleplay servers
Luxury hotel or spa builds
Wellness themed maps
Decorative survival bases
Relaxing multiplayer experiences
Supported Language

Turkish
English
